title: Create empty setup subpage shells for connections, permissions, tools
goal: 설정 하위 페이지 3개의 빈 껍데기를 만든다. /setup/connections, /setup/permissions, /setup/tools. 각 페이지는 제목 + 뒤로가기 버튼만 있는 최소 구조.

test_requirements.expected: page exports default function with title 외부 서비스 연결
page exports default function with title 권한 관리
page exports default function with title 도구 설정

test_requirements.case: Each page has back link to /setup
test_requirements.expected: each page has link to /setup with ← 설정으로 돌아가기

constraints: Minimal pages — just title + back button + placeholder text
Use existing Tailwind patterns from setup page
Use useLanguage() t() for all text
Add ko/en keys to LanguageProvider.tsx for new page titles
Do not modify existing setup/page.tsx yet
Must work in Tauri (use Next.js Link, not window.location)
